paper.title: Dynamical vs Supernova Acceleration of OB Stars in the Small Magellanic Cloud

review.summary: IAU Symposium 361 conference proceedings paper (8 pages). Uses existing RIOTS4 spectroscopic survey data and Gaia DR2/EDR3 proper motions to estimate relative contributions of dynamical ejection vs binary supernova mechanisms for OB runaway stars in the SMC. Reports velocity distributions and mass-velocity density plots. No new data tables published; all results presented as figures. No machine-readable tables, data-availability statements, or external data URLs found in the source. Paper references previously published data from Lamb et al. (2016), Dorigo Jones et al. (2020), and Oey et al. (2018).
